31997066.title: List of The Walking Dead (TV series) characters

pageprops.displaytitle: List of The Walking Dead (TV series) characters

31997066.extract: The following is a list of characters from The Walking Dead television series based on the eponymous comic book series. Although some characters appear in both the television and comic series, the continuity of the television series is not shared with the original comic book series.
